HFM Crypto CFD shadow lane status alias; scans local MT5/HFM symbol evidence and Moss backtest profile metadata.

Read HFM Crypto CFD shadow lane status, detected crypto CFD symbols, Moss backtest profile summary, account brokerSymbolDiagnostics, operatorChecklist, blockers, and safety flags. Frontend first paint must use the compact view=summary variant and may pass scope=secondary/live16 to use the HFM Live16 crypto CFD account.

queryVariants.description: Preserves status, statusZh, nextRequiredActionZh, operatorChecklist, symbolEvidence.brokerSymbolDiagnostics, blockers, sourceFiles, and safety while omitting bulky review bundles for fast account diagnostics.
Uses the configured secondary/Live16 MT5 Files directory for HFM crypto CFD evidence while preserving the same read-only safety boundary. Aliases include scope=live16 and scope=hfm-live16.

endpoints.description: Read detected HFM Crypto CFD symbol evidence from local MT5 Bases roots; no order execution.
Read the HFM Crypto CFD contract-spec export that converts MT5 symbol registry data into review input.
Read the HFM Crypto CFD contract-spec review generated from local MT5/HFM broker symbol specs.
Read the HFM Crypto CFD simulation-profile review for ROI, Sharpe, drawdown, trade count, and liquidation evidence.
Read the HFM Crypto CFD evidence kit with contract-spec templates and read-only collection commands.
Read the HFM evidence bootstrap artifact with draft input paths, filled-input validation, and sim-to-live blocker summary.
Read the MT5 EA exporter review that checks whether the installed QuantGod EA can emit HFM crypto symbol specs.
Read the staged MT5 EA exporter upgrade bundle manifest; it is manual-only and does not mutate MT5 files.
Read the manual MT5 exporter deploy and rollback plan; it describes operator steps only and does not copy files, compile, or mutate MT5.
Read the standalone read-only HFM crypto symbol-spec exporter bundle for manual MT5 review; it does not select symbols, send orders, or change presets.
Read the post-upgrade verifier that checks installed EA source, compiled ex5, exported HFM crypto specs, and contract-spec review status.
Read the HFM post-upgrade controller that coordinates exporter review, manual upgrade bundle, post-upgrade verify, and local contract-spec refresh.
Read the HFM review-input validator that checks manual filled specs/profile or passing contract-spec/simulation review artifacts before promotion review.
Rebuild HFM Crypto CFD shadow state and optional Moss backtest profile mapping; writes local evidence only.
Build a local HFM Crypto CFD contract-spec export from MT5 symbol registry JSON or optional live read-only MT5 registry access.
Build the HFM Crypto CFD contract-spec review from a local JSON/CSV export; does not create MT5 order requests.
Build the HFM Crypto CFD simulation-profile review from an explicit local Moss/backtest JSON or auto-discovered saved HFM profile artifact; does not unlock execution.
Write local HFM Crypto CFD evidence-kit JSON/CSV templates; no MT5 mutation or broker call is made.
Write local HFM evidence bootstrap drafts and review artifact summaries without writing filled inputs, MT5 request files, or broker calls.
Build the local MT5 EA exporter review; it does not copy files into MT5, compile an EA, change presets, or send orders.
Stage the reviewed QuantGod EA source and manifest under runtime for manual MT5 upgrade; no installed files are modified.
Build the manual MT5 exporter deploy and rollback plan; it writes local review evidence only and does not mutate MT5.
Build the standalone read-only HFM crypto symbol-spec exporter bundle for manual review; it writes local review evidence only and cannot send orders.
Build the post-upgrade verifier and, when specs are present, refresh local contract-spec review artifacts without mutating MT5 or sending orders.
Run the HFM post-upgrade controller; it may write local review artifacts but never copies into MT5, compiles an EA, changes presets, or sends orders.
Build the HFM review-input validator artifact from manual filled specs/profile or already passing auto review artifacts; it writes review evidence only and cannot create order requests.
Live automation readiness dossier alias; summarizes sim-to-live review status without writing orders.

Build a current read-only live automation readiness dossier from USDJPY MT5 gates and HFM crypto shadow evidence; HFM account-no-crypto blockers, accountCryptoAvailability, and operatorChecklist must pass through without enabling execution.
Build a transient live automation readiness view from USDJPY MT5 gates and HFM crypto shadow evidence.
Write a local readiness dossier for review; must keep orderSendAllowed and live preset mutation disabled.
Read the local live execution review packet with dry-run order intent specs and blockers.
Write a local live execution review packet; it must not create MT5 order requests, presets, or credentials.
Read the local operator approval draft that lists required final-review acknowledgements.
Write a local operator approval draft; it does not accept secrets or unlock live execution.
Read the local operator approval evidence review; accepted evidence still cannot unlock live execution.
Validate a local operator approval JSON against the review packet hash and required acknowledgements without writing orders.
Read the dry-run live execution plan; it must keep MT5 pending order writes disabled.
Write the dry-run live execution plan for review; no real order files or broker calls are produced.
Read the future MT5 execution lane implementation spec; it remains non-executing.
Write the future execution lane handoff spec after approval evidence and dry-run intents; it still forbids order files and broker calls.
Read the dry-run intent replay review; replay success still cannot write orders.
Replay approved dry-run intents against the execution lane spec without creating MT5 order files or broker calls.
Read the runtime preflight probe that checks fresh MT5 dashboard, live-pilot mode, account, symbol, spread, trade permission, and kill switch evidence without writing orders.
Build the runtime preflight probe from approved dry-run replay and live-pilot MT5 dashboard evidence; it still forbids order files and broker calls.
Read the MT5 order request contract that defines future reviewed request and receipt fields without creating request files.
Build the MT5 order request contract from runtime preflight evidence; it remains contract-only and cannot write broker request files.
Read the sim-to-live automation pipeline that summarizes every review stage without enabling execution.
Run the full sim-to-live review pipeline and write local review artifacts; it still cannot write MT5 request files or broker calls.
Read the execution adapter review shell that validates future request and receipt contracts without side effects.
Build the execution adapter review shell from the sim-to-live pipeline and MT5 request contract; no request files or broker calls are produced.
Read the live evidence intake summary for missing HFM crypto files, review artifacts, MT5 dashboard evidence, and safe refresh commands.
Build the live evidence intake artifact and optional local review artifacts; it cannot write MT5 request files or make broker calls.
Read the live promotion candidate selector that ranks simulation-qualified lanes for operator review without enabling execution.
Build the live promotion candidate selector from readiness, evidence intake, review packet, and pipeline artifacts; no order request files or broker calls are produced.
Read the sim-to-live promotion controller that automates operator review packet generation when a lane is simulation-qualified.
Build the promotion controller and, when candidates exist, write review packet, approval draft, dry-run plan, and pipeline artifacts without enabling execution.
Read the adapter sandbox review bundle that validates future MT5 request and receipt serialization without writing MT5 request files.
Build a local review-only adapter sandbox bundle with sample request and receipt payloads; it cannot call a broker or write request files.
Read the adapter contract validator artifact that checks future MT5 request JSON against the approved request and receipt contract without side effects.
Build the review-only adapter contract validator; it validates request JSON and emits review-only receipts without writing MT5 request files or calling a broker.
Read the sim-to-live orchestrator state machine across evidence, promotion, approval, dry-run, preflight, request contract, adapter review gates, and post-adapter live execution review stages.

Run the full sim-to-live orchestrator and write local review artifacts, including liveExecutionStages for disabled harness, live pilot activation, receipt reconciliation, and EA request reader runtime review; it never writes MT5 request files or calls a broker.
Read the disabled execution adapter harness that plans request and receipt paths for review without writing MT5 Files.
Build the disabled adapter harness with idempotency, atomic-write, and review-only receipt checks; it never writes request files or calls a broker.
Read the live pilot activation review packet that summarizes orchestrator, preflight, adapter harness, and deployment runbook gates without enabling execution.
Build the live pilot activation review packet; it never writes MT5 request files, mutates presets, stores credentials, or calls a broker.
Read the receipt reconciliation review artifact that matches review-only receipts to planned requests and describes auto-disable rules without side effects.
Build the receipt reconciliation review artifact from the disabled harness or a local receipt JSON; it never writes receipt files, mutates auto-disable state, or calls a broker.
Read the EA request reader review artifact that checks source safety markers and upstream review readiness without consuming request files.

Build the EA request reader review artifact; it inspects source markers, upstream review artifacts, and optional EA runtime status JSON/dashboard evidence, but never reads MT5 request files, writes receipts, mutates presets, or calls a broker.
Read the final live execution cutover review artifact that summarizes all review-only prerequisites before a separate implementation review.

Build the final cutover review artifact from orchestrator, activation, receipt, EA reader, preflight, approval, order contract, and disabled harness evidence; it never writes request or receipt files, consumes MT5 requests, mutates presets, or calls a broker.
Read the live execution implementation spec that splits post-cutover work into separate adapter, EA reader, broker send, receipt, and rollback implementation review contracts.
Build the post-cutover implementation spec; it writes a review artifact only and never writes request files, consumes MT5 requests, writes receipts, mutates presets, or calls a broker.
Read the adapter writer review artifact with canonical request serialization, idempotency hashes, and atomic write planning.
Build the adapter writer review artifact; it embeds serialized request payloads for review but never writes MT5 request files, writes receipts, consumes requests, mutates presets, or calls a broker.
Read the EA request consumption review artifact that aligns adapter writer plans with the EA reader contract and disabled runtime status.
Build the EA request consumption review artifact; it creates reject-only consumption plans but never reads request files, writes receipts, consumes requests, mutates presets, or calls a broker.
Read the broker order send wrapper review artifact that binds reviewed EA consumption plans to account, symbol, risk, and receipt obligations.

Build the broker order send wrapper review artifact; it creates blocked broker-send contract plans but never calls a broker, writes request files, writes receipts, mutates presets, or enables order sending.

endpointGroups.name: P3-14 USDJPY 单品种多策略实验室

endpoints.description: USDJPY 策略实验室基础状态别名。
读取 USDJPY-only 策略政策状态。
读取 USDJPY 多策略评分矩阵。
生成或读取 USDJPY EA 干跑决策。
生成 USDJPY 策略政策的中文 Telegram 文案。
运行 USDJPY 策略政策生成；不执行交易。
读取 USDJPY 策略工厂目录，包含东京突破、夜盘回归和 H4 回调三条新增 shadow 策略。
读取 USDJPY shadow 候选信号，用于确认新增策略是否正在采样。
刷新 USDJPY shadow 候选信号；只解析证据，不执行交易。
读取 USDJPY 新策略回测计划。
生成 USDJPY 新策略回测计划；不会启动真实交易。
读取 USDJPY 候选策略政策。
生成 USDJPY 候选策略政策；新策略仍保持 shadow-only。
读取 USDJPY 策略评分和候选信号的证据合并视图。
读取 USDJPY 策略工厂风险检查结果。
读取已导入的 USDJPY 回测结果账本。
导入本机 USDJPY 回测 CSV/JSON 结果；只写研究证据，不执行交易。
读取 USDJPY 实盘 EA 恢复状态、阻断原因和下一步自动动作。
重建 USDJPY 实盘闭环 evidence；只写本地状态和 intent，不直接执行交易。
生成或发送 USDJPY 实盘闭环中文 Telegram 文案。
读取 USDJPY 自学习闭环状态别名，包含数据集、回放、参数候选和配置提案。
读取 USDJPY 自学习闭环状态，包含数据集、回放、参数候选和配置提案。
重建 USDJPY 运行数据集、回放、参数候选和配置提案；只写本地研究证据。
读取或刷新 USDJPY 回放复盘，解释错失机会和过早出场。
读取或刷新 USDJPY tester-only 参数候选；不会自动应用到实盘。
读取或刷新 USDJPY 实盘配置提案；提案进入自主治理门，stage-gated，不再等待人工审批。
生成或发送 USDJPY 自学习闭环中文 Telegram 文案。
读取 USDJPY 因果 bar/tick 回放报告别名；等同 status。
读取 USDJPY 因果 bar/tick 回放报告；后验窗口只用于评分，不参与入场触发。
重建 USDJPY 因果回放报告、入场候选对比、出场候选对比和 replay ledger；不会执行交易。
读取 USDJPY current vs relaxed_entry_v1 入场候选对比；硬门禁不会放宽。
读取 USDJPY current vs let_profit_run_v1 出场持有候选对比；只重估已发生入场的出场表现。
生成或发送 USDJPY 因果回放中文 Telegram 文案；后续由 P3-20 自主治理门评估。
读取 USDJPY walk-forward 稳定性筛选报告别名。
读取 USDJPY train / validation / forward 三段稳定性筛选报告。
重建 USDJPY walk-forward 报告、参数选择和 stage-gated 提案；不执行交易。
读取 USDJPY walk-forward 参数选择结果。
读取 USDJPY stage-gated live config proposal。
生成或发送 USDJPY walk-forward 中文 Telegram 文案。
读取 USDJPY 自主治理 Agent 状态别名。
读取 USDJPY 自主治理 Agent 当前阶段、受控 patch 和回滚状态。
运行 USDJPY 自主治理门；只写受控 patch 和回滚证据，不执行交易。
读取 USDJPY 自主晋级决策。
读取 USDJPY 受控 config patch。
读取 QuantGod v2.5 三车道自主生命周期，包含 Live Lane、MT5 Shadow Lane、HFM Crypto CFD Shadow Lane、美分账户、EA 对账摘要和下一阶段任务状态。
读取 Live / MT5 Shadow / HFM Crypto CFD Shadow 三车道摘要；实盘只允许 USDJPY RSI LONG，模拟继续多策略。
读取 MT5 多策略模拟车道排名和升降级阶段；shadow 策略不能直接进入实盘路线。
读取 HFM Crypto CFD 品种证据、Moss 回测 profile 和 shadow-only 状态；不连接钱包、不保存 broker 凭证、不下单。
读取 EA source、preset、input 和 ex5 hash 对账证据，帮助确认当前实盘 EA 是否来自受控版本。
读取 Daily Autopilot 2.0 中文早盘计划、夜盘复盘、三车道今日动作，以及 Strategy JSON GA Trace 状态和 Telegram Gateway 下一阶段任务。
读取 Daily Autopilot 2.0 状态别名，包含下一阶段任务等待状态。
重建 Daily Autopilot 2.0 中文计划、复盘和下一阶段任务；只写本地证据，不执行交易。
生成或发送 Daily Autopilot 2.0 中文 Telegram 文案，并说明 Strategy JSON / GA Trace 已进入 shadow/tester 过程审计，Telegram Gateway 等待下一阶段；Telegram 仍只推送，不接命令。
读取 USDJPY Strategy JSON SQLite 回测状态别名；只展示本地研究证据，不执行交易。
读取 USDJPY Strategy JSON SQLite 回测状态、K线数量、最新报告和只读安全边界。
写入确定性 USDJPY H1 示例 K线到本地 SQLite，用于本地 smoke 和测试；不触达 MT5 交易。
运行 USDJPY Strategy JSON 回测，输出 report、trades、equity curve 和 GA 可读 fitness evidence。
生成或发送中文 Strategy JSON 回测摘要；Telegram 仍只推送，不接命令。
从 MT5 Python 或 MQL5 CopyRates CSV 增量同步 USDJPY M1/M5/M15/H1 K线到本地 SQLite；只写回测证据。
读取 USDJPY SQLite 历史数据生产验收状态，包含 M1/M5/M15/H1 覆盖深度、K线密度、最新延迟和后台同步来源。
读取 USDJPY Strategy JSON SQLite 回测质量状态，包含历史覆盖、数据来源和同步目标满足情况；只展示回测证据。
读取 USDJPY Evidence OS 审计状态；与 /evidence-os/status 保持兼容。
读取 USDJPY Strategy JSON / Python Replay / MQL5 EA parity、执行反馈、Case Memory 和 Telegram Gateway 审计状态。
生成 USDJPY evidence OS 审计包：parity、execution feedback、case memory 和 push-only notification ledger。
重建并读取 Strategy JSON / Python Replay / MQL5 EA parity report。
重建并读取 USDJPY live execution feedback / execution quality report。
重建并读取 USDJPY Case Memory，总结错失机会、早出、执行偏差和下一代 GA 线索。
生成 USDJPY evidence OS 中文 Telegram 文案；走 push-only Gateway，不接命令。
读取 P4-7 Case Memory → shadow Strategy JSON candidate / GA seed hint 状态别名；不执行交易。
读取 Case Memory strategy structure report、parity gate、shadow Strategy JSON candidate 和 GA seed 线索。
把 Case Memory root cause 转成 proposed mutation、shadow Strategy JSON candidate 和 GA seed hint；PARITY_FAIL 会阻断。
生成 Case Memory 策略结构候选中文 Telegram 文案；push-only，不接交易命令。
读取 USDJPY Strategy JSON GA 总状态别名；只展示 GA 过程审计，不直接进入实盘。
读取 USDJPY Strategy JSON GA 当前代数、种群、最佳 fitness、阻断数量和下一步动作。
运行一代 USDJPY Strategy JSON GA，写入 generation、candidate、elite、blocker 和 evolution path 证据；不下单、不改 preset。
读取 GA generation ledger，用于展示每一代如何生成、评分、保留和淘汰。
读取 GA candidate runs，包含 seedId、Strategy JSON、fitness 分解、rank、阶段和阻断原因。
GA candidate 详情路由前缀；实际查询使用 seedId 子路径，不读取或修改交易状态。
读取单个 GA seed 的 Strategy JSON、父代来源、fitness 分解、replay/walk-forward 状态和阻断解释。
读取 GA 进化路径，展示每代 bestFitness、bestStrategy、avgFitness 和阻断趋势。
读取 GA blocker summary，解释 schema、safety、样本、walk-forward、过拟合、max adverse 等失败原因。
生成或发送中文 GA 进化报告；Telegram 仍只推送，不接收交易命令。
读取 Agent 今日待办，含车道、状态、指标、升降级、回滚状态和下一阶段任务；无需人工回灌。
读取 Agent 今日待办状态别名，包含下一阶段任务等待状态。
由 Agent 重建并写入今日待办和下一阶段任务；只写本地证据，不执行交易。
生成或发送 Agent 今日待办中文 Telegram 文案，包含下一阶段任务；Telegram 仍只推送，不接命令。
读取 Agent 每日复盘，含净 R、最大不利 R、错失机会、早出场、升降级、回滚状态和下一阶段任务。
读取 Agent 每日复盘状态别名，包含下一阶段任务等待状态。
由 Agent 重建并写入每日复盘和下一阶段任务；只写本地证据，不执行交易。
生成或发送 Agent 每日复盘中文 Telegram 文案，包含下一阶段任务；Telegram 仍只推送，不接命令。
生成或发送 USDJPY 自主治理中文 Telegram 文案。
读取 P4-5 Telegram Gateway 运维观测状态别名；只做 push-only 队列、去重、限频、ledger 观测。
读取 P4-5 Telegram Gateway 运维观测状态，包含队列、待投递、真实发送、抑制、失败和 topic 视图。
收集 Daily Autopilot、GA、Agent 和 HFM Crypto CFD 报告进入 push-only Gateway 队列；不接收 Telegram 命令。
生成 Telegram Gateway 运维中文预览；仍只推送，不接 Telegram 命令。
读取 USDJPY Agent operations health 状态别名；只汇总本地证据与心跳，不执行交易。
读取 USDJPY Agent loop、Evidence OS、Telegram Gateway 和本地 runtime 健康状态。
读取 P4-4 Strategy JSON GA Factory 状态别名；只做工厂归档，不执行交易。
读取 GA Factory state、elite archive、strategy graveyard 和 lineage tree 摘要。
生成 GA Factory state、elite archive、strategy graveyard、lineage tree、reflection report 和 ledger；不下单、不改 preset。
读取自然语言 Strategy Factory intent plan；只生成 shadow-only Strategy JSON 和性格锁计划。
从大白话生成 shadow-only Strategy JSON seed、五维信号计划、30+ 参数和性格锁进化计划；不触发交易。
读取 Hyperliquid/Moss 只读影子车道状态。
写入 Moss agent 链接和可选本地 profile JSON 到只读 shadow mapping；不授权钱包、不下单。
生成 GA Factory 中文 Telegram 文案；push-only，不接交易命令。
读取 GA Factory 状态短别名；等同 /api/strategy-ga-factory。
读取 GA Factory 状态短别名；等同 /api/strategy-ga-factory/status。
构建 GA Factory 短别名；等同 /api/strategy-ga-factory/build。
生成 GA Factory 中文 Telegram 文案短别名。
读取独立 Telegram Gateway 队列、ledger、去重、限频和 push-only 状态。
写入中文测试 NotificationEvent 到 Gateway 队列；不发送交易命令。
处理 Gateway 队列；默认只写 ledger，send=1 时仍要求 push allowed 且 commands disabled。
读取独立 Telegram Gateway 状态兼容别名。
读取 Strategy JSON → MQL5 EA 只读契约状态兼容别名；只用于 shadow/tester/paper lane 评估。
读取 Strategy JSON → MQL5 EA 只读契约状态、所选 seed、fingerprint 和 EA 回执；只用于 shadow/tester/paper lane 评估。
生成 EA 可读取的 Strategy JSON contract 文件；不下单、不改 live preset。
生成 Strategy JSON → EA 只读契约中文摘要；Telegram 仍只推送，不接命令。

endpointGroups.name: P4-6 Production Evidence Validation
endpointGroups.description: Read-only production evidence validation across core runtime evidence integrity, USDJPY history, parity, execution feedback, and GA stability.
